actionItems.title: Apply 7 rewards migrations to production Supabase
actionItems.description: 7 migrations committed to git (Phase 1-7: rewards, ambassadors, marketplace, partners, fundraising, bartering, events) but NOT applied in production. Run the Lovable prompt I'll provide to apply them. Blocks all downstream rewards work.
actionItems.impact: CRITICAL — unlocks entire rewards + affiliate program

actionItems.title: Backfill referral codes for all 58 existing profiles
actionItems.description: After migrations apply, every existing user needs a unique referral code. Claude will run the backfill via SQL once tables exist.
actionItems.impact: Every existing client becomes a potential referrer overnight

actionItems.title: Decide ambassador launch criteria + initial invite list
actionItems.description: Who gets Platinum vs Gold vs Silver on launch? Top referrers from existing clients? Network personal connections? This drives the first 10-30 ambassadors and sets the tone.
actionItems.impact: Seeds the referral flywheel

actionItems.title: Provide GoHighLevel API key
actionItems.description: UNBLOCKED 2026-04-19. Keys now in Supabase (GHL_API_KEY for GP, GHL_BRANDING_API_KEY for H&B, webhook secrets). Full bidirectional + cross-sync live.
actionItems.impact: Unblocks CRM Integration (+7 health points)

actionItems.title: Redeploy headshot-ghl-sync + square-payment-sync in Lovable
actionItems.description: Just committed to GitHub (d9289d5): new headshot-ghl-sync edge function + square-payment-sync modifications. Lovable needs to pull + deploy both. Unblocks Outcomes 1, 3, 4 of GHL integration.
actionItems.impact: Goes live: AI purchases auto-tag contacts, headshot completions auto-flag, AI Full/Premium buyers auto-qualify as GP prospects

actionItems.title: Provide Anthropic Admin API key
actionItems.description: UNBLOCKED 2026-04-20. ANTHROPIC_ADMIN_API_KEY + ANTHROPIC_ORG_ID live in Supabase. Edge function anthropic-cost-sync built. launchd scheduled for daily 7:00 AM sync.
actionItems.impact: Enables real-time API cost tracking

actionItems.title: Anthropic cost sync (RESOLVED: $0 is correct)
actionItems.description: Sync works, but Anthropic Admin API correctly returns $0 because Ken pays for Claude Code via Claude Max subscription ($200/mo flat), not developer API. Edge functions use Gemini. Sync infra kept dormant in case direct Anthropic API calls get added later.
actionItems.impact: Truth established: Claude Max is a fixed line item; real variable AI spend is on Gemini

actionItems.title: Build real Gemini spend tracking (self-instrumented)
actionItems.description: Create _shared/gemini-client.ts wrapper around all Gemini API calls (generate_single_image, admin-finish-order, admin-generate-image, generate-copy, gp-auto-content, brand-designer-agent, content-scheduler-agent, template-factory-agent). Wrapper logs each call to ai_spend_daily with model, tokens, and calculated cost. Replaces the $120/mo estimate with real numbers.
actionItems.impact: Real-time Gemini cost visibility instead of estimate

actionItems.title: Provide Meta Ads access token
actionItems.description: For automated ad spend tracking. business.facebook.com > Business Settings > System Users > Generate Token with ads_read permission. Also need Ad Account ID (act_...)
actionItems.impact: Enables live ad spend tracking in dashboard

actionItems.title: Add VITE_UNSPLASH_ACCESS_KEY to Lovable env
actionItems.description: Enables stock photo panel in Creative Studio. Free key at unsplash.com/developers. Add to Lovable project env variables.
actionItems.impact: Unlocks stock photo search in Creative Studio

actionItems.title: Pull latest from GitHub in Lovable (signature-brand-forge)
actionItems.description: Sync the SEO overhaul + blog + effects panel + stock photos + AI designer changes. In Lovable: click GitHub icon > Pull from GitHub.
actionItems.impact: Puts all recent code changes live on production

actionItems.title: Paste Lovable SEO prompt into signatureheadshotevent.com project
actionItems.description: Prompt is READY at ~/Desktop/signature-ops/seo-kit/lovable-prompt-signatureheadshotevent.md — open that file, copy the entire prompt, paste into the Lovable chat for signatureheadshotevent.com project. Covers 8 location pages, Event schema, LocalBusiness per market, full SEO stack. THIS IS THE BOOKING SITE — biggest direct revenue impact.
actionItems.impact: Massive — this is where every ad dollar lands

actionItems.title: Add VideoObject schema once dedicated esthetician video is ready
actionItems.description: Ken is creating a dedicated video specifically for the esthetician page. Once the video URL is live, Claude will add a VideoObject entry to the @graph schema and add a video sitemap extension. The 29-image gallery + ImageGallery schema is already shipped.
actionItems.impact: Video rich result eligibility in Google SERP

actionItems.title: Execute Squarespace SEO plan for Headshots-Branding.com
actionItems.description: Plan is READY at ~/Desktop/signature-ops/seo-kit/squarespace-seo-headshots-branding.md — 6 phases covering site settings, per-page SEO, code injection schemas (Organization, LocalBusiness x2, Service, FAQPage), image alt text, blog setup, sitemap submission. Execute in Squarespace admin in priority order. 90 min for highest impact phases.
actionItems.estimatedTime: 2-3 hours full; 90 min for top priority phases
actionItems.impact: Rank this domain for 'Lake Wales' + 'Fort Lauderdale' + headshot queries, complement main sites

actionItems.title: Submit sitemap to Google Search Console
actionItems.description: URL: https://signaturebranding.app/sitemap.xml. Go to search.google.com/search-console > add property > Sitemaps > submit. Also submit signatureheadshotevent.com sitemap once updated.
actionItems.impact: Gets new pages indexed within days instead of weeks

actionItems.title: Set up Winter Haven GMB from kit
actionItems.description: Use ~/Desktop/signature-ops/seo-kit/gmb-content-kit.md — Winter Haven section. Copy-paste description, services, Q&A seeds, Google Posts. HQ market — do this one flawlessly first.
actionItems.impact: Local pack rankings in Polk County

actionItems.title: Set up Atlanta GMB from kit
actionItems.description: Use gmb-content-kit.md — Atlanta section. Your strongest revenue market — second priority after Winter Haven.
actionItems.impact: Dominates local pack in strongest market

actionItems.title: Set up Orlando GMB from kit
actionItems.description: Use gmb-content-kit.md — Orlando section. Biggest volume opportunity in Central FL.
actionItems.impact: Local visibility across Orlando metro

actionItems.title: Set up remaining 5 GMB profiles
actionItems.description: Lake Wales, Lakeland, Tampa, Fort Lauderdale, Palm Beach. Use gmb-content-kit.md for each. Can spread over 2 weeks.
actionItems.impact: Full local coverage across FL markets

actionItems.title: Submit to Bing Places + Apple Business Connect
actionItems.description: Easy wins. Bing = bingplaces.com. Apple = businessconnect.apple.com. Use NAP details from backlink-strategy.md.
actionItems.impact: ~15% of desktop search traffic + Apple Maps

actionItems.title: Complete Yelp listings for all 8 markets
actionItems.description: biz.yelp.com — claim/create for each market. Upload 10+ photos per listing.
actionItems.impact: Yelp still drives significant local traffic

actionItems.title: Join 3 priority chambers of commerce
actionItems.description: Winter Haven Chamber, Metro Atlanta Chamber, Orlando Regional Chamber. Backlinks + local credibility + networking.
actionItems.impact: Authority backlinks + partnership pipeline

actionItems.title: Send 5 partnership outreach emails
actionItems.description: Use templates in backlink-strategy.md. Target wedding vendors + real estate brokerages + salons in Winter Haven or Atlanta.
actionItems.impact: 15-25 backlinks over 30 days

actionItems.title: Submit to top 20 directories (Tier 1)
actionItems.description: See backlink-strategy.md Tier 1 list. Target: Foursquare, Brownbook, Cylex, Manta, Hotfrog, Yellowpages, BBB, MapQuest, plus beauty-specific (Booksy, Fresha, Vagaro, StyleSeat).
actionItems.impact: 25-40 citations for NAP consistency

actionItems.title: Point Meta + Google ads to new PPC sub-variants
actionItems.description: Update ad sets: salon owners ads → /industries/beauty/salon-owners | hairstylists → /industries/beauty/hairstylists | estheticians → /industries/beauty/estheticians | nail techs → /industries/beauty/nail-techs. Expected Quality Score boost: +2 to +4.
actionItems.impact: Lower CPC, higher conversion from existing ad spend

actionItems.title: Optimize GHL Booking Bot scripts
actionItems.description: Currently underperforming. Review current booking conversation flows, add better objection handling, improve follow-up sequence timing. Can prompt Claude next session.
actionItems.impact: Direct booking rate improvement (front-line closer)

actionItems.title: Decide: push more revenue through Stripe or keep Square primary
actionItems.description: Stripe shows $0 because it's platform-only. Not urgent unless you want to unify revenue reporting. Square works fine for now.
actionItems.impact: Clean revenue reporting (optional)

PROMPT 0 complete: 7 rewards migrations applied, 58 profiles backfilled with referral codes, 6 edge functions deployed. Backend fully live, ready for separate Rewards Lovable app to re-point.

Fulfillment Monitor admin panel live — stuck/partial-failure jobs auto-detected, admin alert emails, one-click retry

Creative Studio upgraded — effects panel (shadow/glow/outline), gradient editor, 3 new shapes (star/arrow/diamond), text rotation + letter spacing
